overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a group of nomads gathered around a large bonfire on a rooftop or elevated industrial area, with the iconic Arasaka towers visible in the Night City skyline background. The camera remains static throughout, capturing the warm firelight contrasting against the cool blue night sky while characters sit and stand around the campfire.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop campfire gathering overlooking futuristic city skyline

agents.ego_description: stationary camera observing the nomad gathering around the bonfire from a fixed vantage point

notable_agents.action: standing figure holding a weapon, observing the fire
seated figure gesturing with hands raised

entered.detail: large roaring campfire with bright orange flames providing primary illumination
twin illuminated skyscrapers with distinctive blue lighting dominating the skyline
tall palm tree silhouette against the night sky
large circular wind turbine or fan structure silhouetted against the sky
red cylindrical metal barrel near the edge of the gathering
low industrial building with corrugated metal walls

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime scene showing a nomad camp gathered around a central bonfire. The Arasaka towers rise prominently in the distant skyline, bathed in blue light. Several characters sit on scattered chairs around the fire while others stand at the periphery. A palm tree and wind turbine structure frame the scene on opposite sides, with industrial sheds visible to the right. The fire casts warm orange light across the concrete ground, contrasting with the cool cyberpunk city glow in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a nomad camp that balances the intimate warmth of a communal fire against the cold scale of a futuristic metropolis. It begins with a focus on the central bonfire, where the flickering orange light illuminates characters gathered on chairs and standing at the periphery of the concrete rooftop. As the eye moves outward, the scene is framed by a solitary palm tree and a wind turbine structure, with industrial sheds grounding the camp in a rugged environment. The perspective then expands to reveal the distant Night City skyline, where the Arasaka towers rise prominently, bathed in a stark, cool blue light. This visual contrast finally settles into a steady composition, pitting the small, warm sanctuary of the nomads against the imposing, neon glow of the corporate city.
